CREATE TABLE test_decimal (id INT PRIMARY KEY, amount DECIMAL(10, 2));
SELECT id FROM test_decimal WHERE amount = (SELECT MAX(amount) FROM test_decimal);
CREATE TABLE test_join (id INT PRIMARY KEY, dec_amount DECIMAL(8, 3));
SELECT a.id, a.amount, b.dec_amount FROM test_decimal a JOIN test_join b ON a.id = b.id;
INSERT INTO test_decimal (id, amount) SELECT id, AVG(dec_amount) FROM test_join GROUP BY id;
SELECT SUM(amount) FROM test_decimal WHERE amount < (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM test_decimal);
CREATE TABLE complex_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, total DECIMAL(18, 5), order_count INT);
INSERT INTO complex_data (id, total, order_count) VALUES (1, 1234567.89123, 3);
INSERT INTO complex_data (id, total, order_count) VALUES (2, 999999999.99999, 5);
SELECT id, total, order_count FROM complex_data WHERE total >= (SELECT AVG(total) FROM complex_data) ORDER BY total DESC;
CREATE TABLE nested_test (id INT, price DECIMAL(12, 4), quantity INT);
INSERT INTO nested_test (id, price, quantity) VALUES (1, 12.3456, 10), (2, 987.6543, 5);
SELECT id, (price * quantity) AS total_price FROM nested_test WHERE total_price > (SELECT AVG(price * quantity) FROM nested_test);
